title: The Environment Relief Fund Scheme, 2008-Re appointment of Fund Manager

और, पया榁वरण राहत िनिध 瀡क琉म, 2008 के पैरा 4 के उप-पैरा (1) म犆 अनुबंध 琈कया था 琈क यूनाइटेड इं瀙योर犆स कंपनी िलिमटेड उ榉त 瀡क琉म क琉 अिधसूचना क琉 तारीख से पांच वष榁 क琉 अविध के िलए उ榉त 瀡क琉म क琉 िनिध 灹बंधक होगी ; उ榉त िनिध 灹बंधक क琉 पांच वष榁 क琉 अविध समा瀉त हो गई है ; और भारत सरकार के त瀄कालीन पया榁वरण और वन मं灴ालय क琉 अिधसूचना सं. सा.का.िन. 497(अ) तारीख 10 जुलाई, 2014 獧ारा क犆灶ीय सरकार ने यूनाइटेड इं瀙योर犆स कंपनी िलिमटेड को 30 जून, 2015 तक के िलए िनिध 灹बंधक के 牲प म犆 पुन: िनयु榉त 琈कया था ; भारत सरकार के त瀄कालीन पया榁वरण और वन मं灴ालय क琉 अिधसूचना सं. का.आ. 1878(अ) तारीख 13 जुलाई, 2015 獧ारा 31 琈दसंबर, 2015 तक और अविध के िलए िनिध 灹बंधक के 牲प म犆 यूनाइटेड इं瀙योर犆स कंपनी िलिमटेड ने पुन: िनयु榉त 琈कया है ; भारत सरकार ने पया榁वरण, वन और जलवायु प琇रवत榁न मं灴ालय क琉 अिधसूचना सं. का.आ. 1878(अ) तारीख 13 नवंबर, 2015 के िलए संशोधन 獧ारा 31 माच榁, 2016 क琉 और अविध के िलए िनिध 灹बंधक क琉 अविध बढ़ा दी थी ; क犆灶ीय सरकार ने िव瀄त मं灴ालय, िव瀄तीय सेवाएं िवभाग से परामश榁 करके िनिध 灹बंधकक琉 िनयुि榉त के िलए 灹क琉रता猒 के अनुसार पया榁वरण, वन और जलवायु प琇रवत榁न मं灴ालय म犆 पया榁वरण राहत िनिध 瀡क琉म, 2008 पुन:िनयुि榉त क琉 स瀓यक 灹琈灙या वचनबंध 琈कया है ; अत:, अब, क犆灶ीय सरकार, पया榁वरण राहत िनिध 瀡क琉म, 2008 के पैरा 4 के उप-पैरा (2) के अनुसरण म犆 और अिधसूचना सं. का.आ. 1878(अ) तारीख 13 जुलाई, 2015 को उन बात犘 के िसवाय िज瀈ह犆 ऐसे अिध灙ांत करते 牣ए अिध灙मण से पहले 琈कया गया है या करने -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] का लोप 琈कया गया है, 31 माच榁, 2019 क琉 और अविध के िलए पया榁वरण राहत िनिध 瀡क琉म, 2008 के अधीन िनिध 灹बंधक के 牲प म犆 यूनाइटेड इं瀙योर犆स कंपनी िलिमटेड को पुन: िनयु榉त करती है । [फा.सं. 18-13/91-पी.एल.-एचएसएम.डी] िब瀙वनाथ िस瀈हा, संयु榉त सिचव 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉प 琇ट瀉पण णण ण :::: मूल अिधसूचना सा.का.िन. 468(अ) तारीख 4 नवंबर, 2008 獧ारा भारत के राजप灴 म犆 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी । MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th June, 2016. G.S.R. 606(E).—Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7A of the Public Liability Insurance Act, 1991 (6 of 1991), the Central Government in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests vide notification number G.S.R. 768 (E), dated the 4th November, 2008, notified a scheme, namely, the Environment Relief Fund Scheme, 2008; And whereas, sub-paragraph (1) of paragraph 4 of the Environment Relief Fund Scheme, 2008 provided that the United India Insurance Company Limited shall be the Fund Manager of the said scheme for a period of five years from the date of notification of the said scheme; And whereas, the five year term of the said Fund Manager expired on 3rd November, 2013; And whereas, the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests vide a notification number G.S.R. 497 (E), dated the 10th July, 2014, reappointed the United India Insurance Company Limited as a Fund Manager for a further period upto 31st December, 2014; And whereas, the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change vide notification number G.S.R. 287 (E), dated the 30th January, 2015, reappointed the United India Insurance Company Limited as a Fund Manager for a further period upto 30th June, 2015; And whereas, the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change vide notification number S.O. 1878 (E), dated the 13th July, 2015, reappointed the United India Insurance Company Limited as a Fund Manager for a further period upto 31st December, 2015; And whereas, the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change by an amendment to the notification number S.O. 1878 (E), dated the 13th July, 2015, extended the tenure of the Fund Manager for a further period upto 31st March, 2016; And whereas, the Central Government in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change, in accordance with the modalities for appointment of Fund Manager drawn by it in consultation with the Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance, have undertaken due process of appointment or reappointment of Fund Manager under the Environment Relief Fund Scheme, 2008; Now, therefore, in pursuance of sub-paragraph (2) of paragraph 4 of the Environment Relief Fund Scheme, 2008, and in supersession of notification number S.O. 1878 (E), dated the 13th July, 2015, the Central Government reappoints the United India Insurance Company Limited as Fund Manager, except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, under the Environment Relief Fund Scheme, 2008, for a further period up to 31st March, 2019. [F. No. 18-13/91-PL-HSMD] BISHWANATH SINHA, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number G.S.R. 768 (E), dated the 4th November, 2008.
